scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=neutral --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=neutral --format=cjs --target=es2022 --outfile=dist/index.cjs
